name: telegram-wus
description: Fork of anthropics/claude-plugins-official serving a single plugin: Sven's patched telegram with atomic-lock + follower-mode dedup (supersedes upstream 0.0.6's SIGTERM regression).

plugins.name: telegram-wus
plugins.description: Telegram messaging bridge with built-in access control. Patched: atomic O_CREAT|O_EXCL poll lock + follower mode, replacing upstream's SIGTERM-kill dedup that breaks the first session's MCP pipe. Renamed to telegram-wus to eliminate name collision with upstream telegram@claude-plugins-official.
